column1: 注:1.本表使用等价折标系数折算标准煤。
2.按照《“十四五”节能减排综合工作方案》等文件通知要求，自2021年，计算本指标时扣除原料用能、可再生能源、
a) Data of standard coal equivalent is calculated on the basis of the consumed heat value equivalent.
b) According to the Comprehensive Work Plan for Energy Conservation and Emission Reduction for the "14th Five-Year Plan"
Period, the involved energy consumption for the calculation of this index since 2021 has not included energy used as raw material,
renewable energy and energy consumption used for projects listed separately.
